prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年最低位次分别为24→7→24→30→105名，2021–2024年位次在7–30名区间窄幅波动，2025年大幅后移至105名，近一年后移约75名，属显著异常波动；2021–2022年计划1人，2023–2025年扩至2人；2026年招生计划数据因文件未完整读取，暂按与2025年持平（2人）处理，计划无变化，对竞争影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京大学医学部为985、211、双一流高校，隶属北京大学，软科主榜北京大学排名第2（2026年），医学部属国内顶尖医学院校，层次极高，对考生吸引力持续强劲；声誉数据未完整读取，但北京大学医学部作为国内顶级医学院，长期保持高度正面声誉，临床医学、口腔医学为传统王牌专业，报考热度居高不下；临床医学、口腔医学为北京大学医学部核心优势学科，预计均为A+等级（第五轮学科评估），与招生专业直接对应，学科实力对考生有强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床 医学（八年制本博连读）、口腔医学（八年制本博连读）属医学类最热门专业方向，社会热度持续高位；海南省考生总数变化数据未完整读取，暂；北京大学医学部位于北京，属跨省招生；海南省本地无同等层次医学院校，考生跨省报考意愿强，地域因素对位次影响中性偏正面。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次异常后移（ 可能受专业名称调整或报考心理波动影响）、2026年招生计划持平、学校顶尖层次及医学专业持续高热等因素，预计2026年位次将较2025年小幅回升（竞争略加剧），预测最低位 次约100名，区间88–112名。

- 临床医学（八年制本博连读）
- 口腔医学（八年制本博连读）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 该校在海南省仅投放临床医学和口腔医学两个八年制本博连读专业，2025年录取位次均为105名，属同一难度层级。预测2026年位次区间88–112名，建议位次在区间内均可大胆报 考，位次优于88名则录取把握较大；两个专业均为顶级医学王牌，可根据个人兴趣选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings were 24→7→24→30→105 respectively. From 2021 to 2024, rankings fluctuated narrowly within the 7–30 range, but in 2025, they significantly dropped to 105, a shift of about 75 places in one year, indicating a notable abnormal fluctuation. The enrollment plan was 1 person from 2021 to 2022, and expanded to 2 persons from 2023 to 2025. The 2026 enrollment plan data was not fully read from the file, so it is temporarily assumed to be the same as 2025 (2 persons), with no change in plan, having a neutral impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University Health Science Center is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, affiliated with Peking University. On the Soft Science main ranking, Peking University ranks 2nd (2026). The Health Science Center is among the top medical schools in China, with an extremely high level, continuously attracting strong interest from candidates. Reputation data was not fully read, but as a top domestic medical school, Peking University Health Science Center maintains a highly positive reputation over the long term, with clinical medicine and stomatology being traditional flagship majors, leading to sustained high application enthusiasm. Clinical medicine and stomatology are core advantageous disciplines of Peking University Health Science Center, expected to be rated A+ (fifth round of discipline evaluation), directly corresponding to the enrollment majors, and the disciplinary strength strongly attracts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical medicine (eight-year combined bachelor's and doctoral program) and stomatology (eight-year combined bachelor's and doctoral program) are among the most popular medical major directions, with sustained high social heat. Data on changes in the total number of candidates in Hainan Province was not fully read, so it is temporarily unavailable. Peking University Health Science Center is located in Beijing, involving cross-province enrollment. Hainan Province has no medical school of equivalent level locally, so candidates have a strong willingness to apply across provinces, and the regional factor has a neutral to slightly positive impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the abnormal ranking shift in 2025 (possibly due to major name adjustments or psychological fluctuations in application), the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the top-tier level of the school, and the sustained high popularity of medical majors, it is predicted that the ranking in 2026 will slightly recover compared to 2025 (competition slightly intensifies), with a predicted minimum ranking of about 100, and a range of 88–112.

- Stomatology (Eight-Year Combined Bachelor's and Doctoral Program)

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The school only offers clinical medicine and stomatology, both eight-year combined bachelor's and doctoral programs, in Hainan Province. In 2025, the admission ranking for both was 105, belonging to the same difficulty level. The predicted ranking range for 2026 is 88–112. It is recommended that candidates with rankings within this range can apply boldly; those with rankings better than 88 have a higher chance of admission. Both majors are top-tier medical programs, and candidates can choose based on personal interest.
